claim.observation: Trusted 2018-05-13T10:05Z..10:15Z window summary records 168 EVTX rows across security/system/application sources; selected Security events in-window are 4624=6, 4672=4, 4648=2, 4634=2. The same window has 61 Prefetch files with 82 last-run slots; selected Prefetch rows include Chrome files=6/slots=7/run_count_total=98, OneDrive files=1/slots=1/run_count_total=20, Explorer files=1/slots=1/run_count_total=16, while Chrome History visits/downloads, LNK rows, and JumpList rows are zero in this window.
claim.interpretation: This is a bounded host/account artifact timing layer for the 10:05Z..10:15Z window. It supports local program/activity timing leads, especially Prefetch and EVTX co-presence, but does not identify the human operator, intent, transfer direction, upload completion, or cloud-sync completion. The zero Chrome/LNK/JumpList rows are scoped to this window and captured artifacts only.
